description_long: This sconce features a central cylindrical hub from which five evenly spaced arms radiate outward, each supporting a drum-shaped lampshade. The shades are smooth and opaque, likely designed to diffuse light softly. Each arm is adorned with decorative, turned elements that add a touch of elegance and symmetry to the fixture. The sconce is suspended from a long, slender rod that connects to a ceiling mount, making it suitable for overhead installation. The overall design is clean and balanced, with a focus on geometric forms and subtle ornamentation. The finish appears to be a uniform, glossy white, contributing to a modern yet timeless aesthetic.
description: A five-armed ceiling sconce with drum-shaped shades and decorative turned elements, finished in glossy white. The design is geometric and elegant, suitable for modern interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five lampshades symmetrically arranged around the central hub.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth and spacing between the arms and shades.
description_view_2: Rear view with the central shade most prominent and the arms radiating outward.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view, emphasizing the symmetry and decorative details on the arms.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern design with clean lines, drum-shaped shades, and subtle decorative turned elements on the arms. Its glossy white finish and geometric symmetry evoke a contemporary yet timeless style.
